frontmatter.description: Application cannot acquire a database connection within the configured timeout

signature.embedding_seed: database connection timeout pool exhausted unreachable

body:
## When this fires
The app failed to obtain a connection from the pool within the configured timeout. Causes include pool exhaustion, an unreachable database host, or DNS issues to the DB endpoint.

## Playbook
1. Check db-pool-saturation to see if active connections are pinned at the limit.
2. Read db-host-status to rule out a managed-database incident.
3. Inspect recent-deploys-db for changes to pool sizing or DSN.

## Common confusion
This is *not* [[db-replica-lag]]: that fires when the connection succeeds but the read returns stale data.
